privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetic LibreOffice Writer document containing an OmniBase Database Server manual with legacy formatting. The source document is generated at /home/ga/Documents/omnibase_manual.docx with Courier New 10pt Normal style and Times New Roman 14pt Heading 1 style. The task requires modifying Normal to Liberation Serif 11pt, Heading 1 to Liberation Sans 16pt Dark Blue (#000080/RGB 0,0,128), creating a new WarningText style (italic red), and applying it to 3 WARNING: paragraphs. The output is saved to /home/ga/Documents/omnibase_rebranded.docx. Direct formatting must be cleared to remove Arial, Courier New, and Times New Roman manual overrides.
